name: @forgeax/engine-audio
description: Pure-interface audio surface for forgeax-engine — ECS components (AudioSource / AudioListener), AudioBackend protocol, AudioError type family.

bundle-size.reason: MVP audio interface package (ECS component schemas + AudioBackend protocol only); bundle-size lock deferred to a future feat once the tick system and Web Audio backend stabilise

fps.reason: pure-interface package, no runtime canvas; fps is reported by apps that consume the audio tick system

bench.reason: interface-only package with no hot path; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-audio-webaudio backend

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; test surface coverage runs as part of pnpm test:unit + tsc -b

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; this is a production MVP per plan-strategy D-1 (dual-package split)
